Rules.InvariantScript:
AddColumns(
    GroupBy(
        AddColumns(
            Filter(Expenses, UserID.Value = currentUserLogin.Title),
            CategoryText,
            CategoryName
        ),
        CategoryText,
        GroupedData
    ),
    TotalAmountText,
    "£" & Text(Sum(GroupedData, Amount), "#,##0.00")
)

AddColumns(
    GroupBy(
        AddColumns(
            Filter(Expenses, UserID.Value = currentUserLogin.Title),
            CategoryText,
            CategoryName
        ),
        CategoryText,
        GroupedData
    ),
    TotalAmountText,
    "£" & Text(Sum(GroupedData, Amount), "#,##0.00")
)
